summary: step1 最小 live 验收已完成：两条合法 worker evidence 都通过 33/xhs 通道进入消息流并写入 authoritative observed_statuses，current_stage 仍保持 step1；plain text guardrail 未产生新的有效 gate 推进条目，也未把阶段推进。manager formal signal 已通过合法 manager 通道写入 observed_statuses，但 current_stage 仍停在 step1，gate_snapshot.current_stage 仍是 step1，satisfied_gates 仍为空，未推进到 step2。当前第一断点是 target group execution_spec.role_directory 仍为空，导致 authoritative observed_statuses 中 author_role 统一落成 null，gate engine 无法把 worker_run / manager_done 认成满足。
blocker: Worker evidence and manager formal signal both entered authoritative observed_statuses, but role_directory is empty so author_role stays null for all entries; gate engine does not satisfy worker_run or manager_done, and step1 does not advance to step2.
tests: read step1 baseline session on target group
verified worker evidence entered observed_statuses and did not advance current_stage
sent plain text guardrail and verified no progression
sent manager formal close via /send/openclaw and verified step1 still did not advance
